description: __Race:__ Human Iris Midgar is the first princess of the Kingdom of Midgar and older sister of [Alexia Midgar](https://anilist.co/character/168799/Alexia-Midgar). She is also leader of the Crimson Order. (Source: *The Eminence in Shadow* Wiki)

name: Kotori Iida
description: A lonely high schooler and student of Kohei who gives Kohei the address to her mother's restaurant and ends up asking him to make meals and eat them with her (along with Tsumugi). She is a shy, lonely girl whose mother is a good cook but is so busy she rarely has time for her daughter. Her parents divorced when she was in third grade. She is kind and gets along well with Tsumugi. She is a bad cook, partially because of having a large fear of knives. She has a large appetite.
